chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of Direct Offspring

text: 5608 - وَ رَوَى عَلِيُّ بْنُ اَلْحَكَمِ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ عَنْ أَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ جَارٍ لِي هَلَكَ وَ تَرَكَ بَنَاتٍ فَقَالَ "اَلْمَالُ لَهُنَّ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5608 - It is narrated by Ali ibn Al-Hakam from Ali ibn Abi Hamzah from Abu Al-Hasan (as) who said: I asked Imam (as) about my neighbor who passed away and left behind daughters.
Imam (as) replied: "The wealth belongs to them."
